reviews.review_description:
Super polished endless runner from the creators of the all time classic voxelfly. Graphics are awesome, especially for a GO title, the controls are tight and the gameplay is simply addicting and fun!!!

There are lots of unique, well crafzed missions and additionally you can hunt for highscores in arcade mode. 

Just grab it as long as it is possible! Def one of the few really polished go titles 👌👌👌👌👌

Great Game! Fun and fast!
FPS missions are very challenging and immersive
More levels please!!
